title: k4 — open family mesh protocol specification
notes: Specification writing grant. k4-agent-hub is live; spec needed so others can implement compatible hubs without our infra. Operator must rewrite 'I built this because I needed it' paragraph in own voice.

title: Phoenix Navigator (Node Zero) beta hardware + accessibility manual
notes: Hardware beta distribution grant. Operator is AuDHD + hypoparathyroidism. 500-word narrative must be written in operator's voice (no ghostwriting). Portal opens May 15.

title: Node One (Totem) prototype + IP protection + DOBE cert
notes: Explicitly funds IP filings and hardware for neurodivergent builders. Strong fit: Node One is assistive tech for somatic regulation, built by an AuDHD operator. Reopens June 1.

title: Cognitive Passport AI augmentation layer
notes: 75K grant for AI augmentation of Cognitive Passport. Requires 501(c)(3) determination letter but pending status with CP575E is typically accepted.

title: Physical layer completion for sentinel system
notes: Applied April 2026. Decision by ~May 15. If awarded, funds will purchase Home Assistant host, Bangle.js 2, and two kids tablets.

title: NIDILRR Switzer Fellowship (early-career research training)
funder: National Institute on Disability, Independent Living, and Rehabilitation Research
notes: FY2027 cycle. Requires university partnership as host institution. Potential host: Georgia Tech Center for Assistive Technology.

title: Field Initiated Projects (FIP) — three-year research program
notes: Major federal disability research grant (~$750K over 3 years). Requires university partnership as prime applicant with P31 Labs as sub-awardee.

title: ESG Housing Grant
notes: Draft existed but was not submitted. Deadline passed.

title: Gates Grand Challenges — AI to Accelerate Charitable Giving
notes: Draft received but required 40% budget cut + citation verification. Deadline passed before edits completed.

title: Shuttleworth Foundation Fellowship
notes: Shuttleworth Fellowship program closed permanently in 2024.
